caring_community.subtitle: Zeitvorsorge, verifizierte Freiwilligenarbeit, vertrauenswürdige Organisationen, Gruppen, Veranstaltungen, Ressourcen und Wirkungsdaten – alles in einem koordinierten Sorge-Workflow.

meta.title: Dein Zeitvorsorge-Fonds

future_care_fund.title: Dein Zeitvorsorge-Fonds

future_care_fund.intro: Das sind nicht nur Stunden. Das ist die Fürsorge, die du in deiner Gemeinschaft gespart hast — abrufbar für Einkäufe, Arztbesuche oder einfach Gesellschaft, wann immer du sie brauchst.

reciprocity.title: Deine Bilanz
reciprocity.strong_giver: Du hast weit mehr gegeben als erhalten — dein Zeitvorsorge-Fonds steht stark da.
reciprocity.strong_receiver: Du hast grosszügig Hilfe erhalten — wenn du bereit bist, gib deiner Gemeinschaft zurück.

submit.title: Anliegen zur Schutz und Sicherheit melden
submit.subtitle: Solche Meldungen helfen uns, unsere Gemeinschaft zu schützen. Vielen Dank für Ihren Mut.

form.description_placeholder: Bitte schildern Sie, was Sie beobachtet haben, wann es geschehen ist und welche weiteren Hinweise einer Koordinatorin helfen, angemessen zu reagieren.

submit.confidentiality: Ihre Meldung geht ausschliesslich an die beauftragten Schutz und Sicherheits-Koordinatorinnen Ihrer Gemeinschaft. Die gemeldete Person erfährt Ihren Namen nur, wenn Sie sich aktiv dafür entscheiden.

developers.hero_subtitle: A curated REST API for banking, payment, and municipal admin partners. OAuth2 client credentials, signed webhooks, and a sandbox you can hit in five minutes.
developers.request_access_body: Partner API access is provisioned by your community administrator. Contact them to get a client_id / client_secret pair.
developers.feature_oauth_body: Server-to-server authentication. Short-lived bearer tokens, scoped per partner.
developers.feature_curated_body: Only what banks and admin systems actually need: users, listings, wallet, aggregates.
developers.feature_webhooks_body: HMAC-SHA256 signatures, automatic retries, delivery health in your dashboard.
developers.feature_rate_limit_body: Configurable per-minute quotas. 429 responses include Retry-After.
developers.auth_intro: Exchange your client credentials for a short-lived bearer token, then attach it to every request as Authorization: Bearer <token>.
developers.auth_step1_body: Your community admin provisions a client_id and client_secret in the admin console. The secret is shown only once at creation time.
developers.auth_step2_body: POST your credentials to /api/partner/v1/oauth/token. The response includes access_token, expires_in (3600s), and granted scope.
developers.auth_step3_body: Attach the token to the Authorization header. Tokens are scoped — the API will return 403 insufficient_scope if you exceed your grant.
developers.endpoints_intro: Hand-picked REST endpoints. All paths are prefixed with /api/partner/v1. All responses are JSON with API-Version: 2.0 header.
developers.webhooks_intro: Subscribe to events with HTTPS callback URLs. Each delivery includes an X-Partner-Signature header — an HMAC-SHA256 of the raw body, keyed by the subscription secret returned at creation time.
developers.webhook_event_wallet_credited: wallet.credited — fires when a partner credits time hours via /wallet/credit
developers.webhook_signing_body: Compute HMAC-SHA256 of the raw request body using your subscription secret. Compare with the X-Partner-Signature header in constant time.
developers.webhook_create_body: POST /api/partner/v1/webhooks/subscriptions with event_types (array) and target_url (https only). The response includes a one-time secret — store it.

meta.title: Apply for a Pilot Community
meta.description: Set up a regional Project NEXUS community for your canton, cooperative, or municipality.

provisioning.hero_title: Apply to host a Pilot Community
provisioning.hero_subtitle: Tell us about your region. We review every application and reply by email within 5 working days.
provisioning.intro: Project NEXUS provisions one community per region. Pick a URL slug, choose your languages, and tell us a bit about how you intend to use the platform.

fields.requested_slug_help: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens. Example: zurich-care, glarus.
fields.intended_use: How will you use Project NEXUS?
fields.intended_use_placeholder: A short description of your community goals, target audience, and any partner organisations.

slug_status.reserved: Reserved by the platform — please choose another
slug_status.pending: A pending application already requested this URL
slug_status.invalid_format: Use 3–50 lowercase letters, numbers, or hyphens

provisioning.success_body: Thank you — we have received your application and will review it within 5 working days. Please check your email for updates.
provisioning.status_check_email: Please check your email for updates on your application.
provisioning.status_lookup_failed: We could not find an application for that link.

status_labels.failed: A technical issue occurred — our team has been notified

errors.submit_failed: We could not submit your application. Please try again.
errors.captcha_failed: Please answer the security question correctly.
errors.slug_warning_reserved: That URL is reserved by the platform. Please pick another.
